messages.content: # Enabled Steam Starter but want to remove it? Follow this guide!

## Step 1
> Open Content Manager > Go to Settings > Content Manager > Drive and change the game starter **off** of steam starter and onto **AppID**.

## Step 2
> Go to your <#1322235675239645184>
> Find the "AssettoCorsa" application (it will have the content manager icon)
> Right click that file and rename it to "CM".

## Step 3
> Find the "AssettoCorsa_original" application (it will have the normal assetto corsa icon)
> Right click the file > Rename > Delete the "_original" from the name.

## Step 4
> Now drag the "CM" application out of your <#1322235675239645184> and onto your desktop.
### You are done and can now launch the original Assetto Corsa through steam again.
